name: West Indies Pepper Pot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Short Rib of Beef, 3-inch pieces
1 1/2 lb Stew Beef, cut into 2-inch cubes
Large Green Pepper, cleaned and chopped
4 Medium Sweet Potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and slice green pepper.
2. Peel and cube sweet potatoes.
3. Brown salt pork and short rib pieces in a large kettle until all sides are browned.
4. Add stew beef and brown on all sides.
5. Pour in water and slowly bring to a boil. Skim the surface.
6. Add thyme, salt, and pepper. Lower heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, removing any scum that rises to the top.
7. While meat is simmering, saute onion, garlic, and scallions in heated oil until tender. Add green pepper and saute for 1 minute. Remove from heat and set aside.
8. After meat has cooked for 1 hour, add sauteed vegetables and other ingredients to the kettle. Continue to cook slowly, covered, about 30 minutes, until vegetables and meat are cooked.
9. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Cut off and discard any fat from short ribs. Cube the meat and return it to the kettle. Reheat if necessary.
10. Serves 8.
